pi_items.source: Verified from setup_task.sh which explicitly creates/ensures these 3 exercises and export_result.sh which explicitly checks for these exact pairs.

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on synthetically generated data. The 3 target exercises ("Romanian Deadlift", "Overhead Press", "Bulgarian Split Squat") and their required aliases ("RDL", "OHP", "BSS") are explicitly hardcoded into both the setup_task.sh script and the export_result.sh script logic.
